Ensure a power_array is summarized

Source: R/inputchecks.R
EnsureSummarized.Rd

Ensure a power_array is summarized

Usage

EnsureSummarized(x, summary_function = NULL, condition = "warning")

Arguments

x

A power array

summary_function

What function should be used to summarize the array, if it is not already summarized.

condition

If array is not summarised should a warning or error be produced. Ignored if required dimensions is NULL.

Value

A summarised power_array

On this page
